[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0100010 2
1 0100000 1
2 1110000 3
3 0010000 1
4 0110001 3
5 0100001 2
6 0000000 a
7 1110000 3

01 10 0100001 2 match 5
12 21 0100010 2 match 0
23 32 0100000 1 match 1
34 43 1110000 3 match 2 7
45 54 0110000 2
56 65 0110001 3 match 4
67 76 0010101 3
70 07 0010101 3

02 20 0100000 1 match 1
13 31 0101000 2
24 42 0100010 2 match 0
35 53 0111000 3
46 64 1110000 3 match 2 7
57 75 0010001 2
60 06 1110101 5
71 17 0000001 1

03 30 1110000 3 match 2 7
14 41 0100010 2 match 0
25 52 0100000 1 match 1
36 63 1110000 3 match 2 7
47 74 0010000 1 match 3
50 05 0110001 3 match 4
61 16 0100001 2 match 5
72 27 0000000 a match 6

04 40 1110000 3 match 2 7
15 51 0101001 3
26 62 0100000 1 match 1
37 73 0010000 1 match 3
[completion]
